problem_solved: Long wait times and limited access to mental health services, especially for non-acute conditions
solution_description: Swedish digital mental health platform offering video therapy, CBT programs, and psychiatric consultations. Partners with Swedish regions to provide digital mental healthcare. Integrated with Tandem Health for AI-powered documentation
traction_signals: Partnership with Tandem Health for AI documentation
Integration with public mental health services
notes: Strong Swedish mental health platform. Tandem Health partnership shows ecosystem collaboration. Public system integration model relevant for Vården
